rejected_discoveries.details: Refers to an internal mechanism and initiative (科技防護網) deployed by the Pingtung Government Ethics Department (屏東縣政府政風處), not a distinct public procurement case. No specific identifier found.
Found as a conceptual framework for AI-driven data auditing by the Ethics Department, not a specific procurement case with an identifier.
This is a government ethics education and governance project pushed by the Pingtung Ethics Department to local township heads and civil servants, not a public procurement case.

rejected_discoveries.keyword: 偏遠地區採購業務聯繫平臺
rejected_discoveries.details: Refers to a cross-agency support and contact platform designed to assist remote agencies with procurement practices. It is a long-term mechanism, not a procurement case to be won or executed by a vendor.

Search terms related to the former director returned news and governance updates, but did not yield specific new case identifiers directly attributable to a procurement contract without further case-specific parameters.

General concept search yielded mentions of data analysis requirements in past cases, but no clear, distinct procurement identifier linked to the target scope could be cleanly extracted without broader context.
